traits.locale_text: Ballistic Skill is increased by +<u>(Logic / 10)</u> or +<u>(number of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks / 10)</u>, whichever is higher.
Ballistic Skill is increased by +<u>(Logic / 10)</u> or +<u>(number of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks / 10)</u>, whichever is higher.
